title: Intrigue, Power Plays and Rivalries: Inside the Rise of Mojtaba Khamenei
summary_full: The weeklong fight over Iran’s next leader pitted the Revolutionary Guards against moderates. The generals won, but only over spirited resistance.
summary_public: The weeklong fight over Iran’s next leader pitted the Revolutionary Guards against moderates. The generals won, but only over spirited resistance.
